parameters.query: SELECT id FROM schedules WHERE school_name = '{{$json["schoolName"]}}' AND class_name = '{{$json["className"]}}' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO parent_subscriptions (parent_name, student_name, school_name, class_name, email, phone_number, subscribed_at) VALUES ('{{$json["parentName"]}}', '{{$json["studentName"]}}', '{{$json["schoolName"]}}', '{{$json["className"]}}', '{{$json["email"]}}', '{{$json["phoneNumber"] || NULL}}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (email, class_name) DO UPDATE SET subscribed_at = NOW();

parameters.subject: Welcome to Schedule Updates
parameters.text:
Hi {{$json["parentName"]}},

You've successfully subscribed to schedule updates for {{$json["className"]}} at {{$json["schoolName"]}}.

Your child: {{$json["studentName"]}}

You will receive daily schedules at 6 AM.

To unsubscribe, reply STOP or visit: https://yourdashboard.com/unsubscribe?email={{$json["email"]}}

Best regards,
School Schedule Team

parameters.responseBody: {"error":"Class not found. Please check school name and class name."}
